title: Complete MP Report fixture — Corbyn, Jeremy

subject.notes: Official UK Parliament records verify the member ID, current constituency, current parliamentary affiliation and continuous service start. The repository retains surname-first presentation for deterministic output compatibility.

scope.scope_statement: Fixture proof of the canonical Complete MP Report v1 structure and generator, now including a bounded official UK Parliament identity and parliamentary-service baseline. Other research lanes remain incomplete.
scope.notes: UK Parliament verifies continuous Commons service since 9 June 1983. The identity-and-career section remains partial because the full historic election and boundary chronology has not been independently assessed.

publication.notes: Fixture output must not be treated as a public profile.

sections.title: Identity and parliamentary career
sections.summary: Official UK Parliament records verify member ID 185, current Islington North representation, current Your Party affiliation and continuous Commons service since 9 June 1983; the full career chronology remains partial.

sections.title: Roles and committees
sections.summary: Official UK Parliament records identify one current parliamentary-leadership post, two previous leadership posts and two committee memberships; exhaustive historic role and committee coverage is not claimed.

sections.title: Voting record and coverage
sections.summary: Repository machinery exists for available Commons votes and controlled historic batches, but complete coverage is not established.

sections.title: Financial interests
sections.summary: Official UK Parliament records show 29 entries in the current published snapshot dated 13 July 2026; historical coverage remains incomplete because the current display is subject to a twelve-month retention boundary.

sections.title: Outside work and company links
sections.summary: The four company or organisation links explicitly displayed in the current 13 July 2026 UK Parliament register snapshot have been resolved against official Companies House records; earlier outside-work and company history remains incomplete.

sections.title: Speeches and parliamentary questions
sections.summary: No Hansard or parliamentary-question records are present.

sections.title: Public positions over time
sections.summary: No reviewed position timeline is present.

sections.title: Changes and contradictions
sections.summary: No contradiction claim should be made until dated positions and explanations are reviewed.

sections.title: Organisations and evidenced relationships
sections.summary: No real relationship records are present in the fixture.

sections.title: Evidence gaps
sections.summary: The fixture explicitly records major evidence and access gaps.

sections.title: Source register
sections.summary: Official UK Parliament identity sources are registered, but authoritative public sources for most report sections remain incomplete.

sections.title: Human review
sections.summary: Only the fixture boundary has been reviewed; substantive review remains outstanding.

sources.title: Parliamentary career for Jeremy Corbyn
sources.limitations: Records the current and previous parliamentary representations, parliamentary party affiliations and selected posts shown on the official member career page. It does not independently establish every election, boundary or administrative event across the full career.

sources.title: Last election result for Jeremy Corbyn
sources.limitations: Records the 4 July 2024 general-election result and the candidate's affiliation at that election. It does not describe later parliamentary affiliation changes.

sources.title: MP full vote query fixture
sources.limitations: Contains project-supplied identity fields that explicitly require official verification.

sources.title: Available-source MP vote index builder
sources.limitations: Provides available Commons Votes API workflow, not verified complete career coverage.

sources.title: ParlParse import batch plan v1.9
sources.limitations: A plan and controlled-batch model; it does not prove that the whole period was imported.

sources.title: Webmin server evidence archive plan
sources.limitations: Documents intended storage and recorded project boundaries; live server state remains unverified.

sources.title: Social Security
sources.limitations: Identifies Social Security as a Commons Select Committee. Jeremy Corbyn's membership dates are taken from the official member career record.

sources.title: Justice Committee
sources.limitations: Identifies the Justice Committee as a Commons Select Committee. Jeremy Corbyn's membership dates are taken from the official member career record.

sources.title: Register of Interests for Jeremy Corbyn
sources.limitations: Captures the current published member snapshot only. The page states that interests remain in the Register for twelve months after an interest has ended; it is not a complete historical register.

sources.title: Register of Members' Financial Interests as at 13 Jul 2026
sources.limitations: Identifies the current register version and publication date. Entry content is taken from the official member Registered Interests pages.

sources.title: YOUR PARTY UK LTD overview
sources.limitations: Company identity, number, status, type, incorporation, dissolution and SIC. Companies House states that it does not verify the accuracy of information filed.

sources.title: YOUR PARTY UK LTD people
sources.limitations: Jeremy Bernard Corbyn director appointment. The company overview separately records dissolution.

sources.title: JEREMY CORBYN CAMPAIGN LIMITED overview
sources.limitations: Company identity, number, status, type, incorporation and SIC. Companies House states that it does not verify the accuracy of information filed.

sources.title: JEREMY CORBYN CAMPAIGN LIMITED people
sources.limitations: Jeremy Bernard Corbyn director appointment only; other officers are outside this lane.

sources.title: COMMUNITY UNITY LTD overview
sources.limitations: Company identity, number, status, type, incorporation, dissolution and SIC. It does not evidence bank-signatory status.

sources.title: COMMUNITY UNITY LTD people
sources.limitations: The complete officer page lists four officers and does not list Jeremy Corbyn. Companies House does not record bank signatories.

sources.title: PEACE AND JUSTICE PROJECT LTD overview
sources.limitations: Company identity, number, status, type, incorporation and SIC. Companies House states that it does not verify the accuracy of information filed.

sources.title: PEACE AND JUSTICE PROJECT LTD people
sources.limitations: Jeremy Bernard Corbyn director appointment only; other officers are outside this lane.

facts.statement: The official UK Parliament member record for Jeremy Corbyn uses member ID 185.
facts.notes: The repository keeps the surname-first display form 'Corbyn, Jeremy' while the official source names the member Jeremy Corbyn.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as the MP for Islington North as of 20 July 2026.
facts.notes: Current representation on the official member career page.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as having served continuously as an MP since 9 June 1983.
facts.notes: The source's continuous-service summary is recorded without inferring unlisted administrative events.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as representing Islington North [1983–1997] from 9 June 1983 to 1 May 1997.
facts.notes: Representation label and dates follow the official career page.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as representing Islington North [1997–2010] from 1 May 1997 to 6 May 2010.
facts.notes: Representation label and dates follow the official career page.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as representing Islington North [2010–2024] from 6 May 2010 to 30 May 2024.
facts.notes: Representation label and dates follow the official career page.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as representing the current Islington North constituency from 4 July 2024.
facts.notes: The official page identifies this as the current representation after the 2023 boundary review.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn's parliamentary party affiliation as Labour from 9 June 1983 to 29 October 2020.
facts.notes: This is a parliamentary-affiliation record, not an inference about wider party membership.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn's parliamentary party affiliation as Independent from 29 October 2020 to 10 June 2026.
facts.notes: This is a parliamentary-affiliation record.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn's current parliamentary party affiliation as Your Party from 10 June 2026.
facts.notes: This current affiliation supersedes the Independent affiliation shown for the 2024 election.

facts.statement: At the 4 July 2024 general election, Jeremy Corbyn was elected for Islington North as an Independent with 24,120 votes, representing 49.2% of votes cast.
facts.notes: The election affiliation is recorded separately from the later current parliamentary affiliation.

facts.statement: The repository contains an available-source Commons Votes API index workflow for one MP.
facts.notes: This records repository capability, not a complete current live dataset.

facts.statement: The controlled ParlParse batch plan covers the target period from 2001-06-07 to 2016-04-25.
facts.notes: The plan does not prove that all batches were run.

facts.statement: The current live contents and row counts of the private server evidence archive have not been verified in this session.
facts.notes: A read-only local server inventory is prepared separately.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as Parliamentary Leader, Your Party, from 10 June 2026.
facts.notes: Recorded under Current — Other posts on the official member career page.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as Leader of the Labour Party from 12 September 2015 to 4 April 2020.
facts.notes: Recorded under Previous — Other posts on the official member career page.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as Leader of HM Official Opposition from 12 September 2015 to 4 April 2020.
facts.notes: Recorded under Previous — Opposition posts on the official member career page.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as a member of the Social Security Commons Select Committee from 27 April 1992 to 21 March 1997.
facts.notes: Membership dates come from the official member career record; the linked committee page identifies the committee as a Commons Select Committee.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as a member of the Justice Committee, a Commons Select Committee, from 16 May 2011 to 30 March 2015.
facts.notes: Membership dates come from the official member career record; the linked committee page identifies the committee as a Commons Select Committee.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as an unpaid director of Your Party UK Ltd from 31 July 2025 to 21 April 2026. Companies House identifies YOUR PARTY UK LTD as company 16619803, incorporated on 31 July 2025 and dissolved on 21 April 2026, and records Jeremy Bernard Corbyn as a director appointed on 31 July 2025.
facts.notes: Maps to financial-interest-026 and company-link-your-party-uk-ltd. The officer page's role label is not used to override the overview's dissolved status.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as an unpaid director of Jeremy Corbyn Campaign Ltd from 25 September 2024. Companies House identifies JEREMY CORBYN CAMPAIGN LIMITED as company 15977146, active and incorporated on 25 September 2024, and records Jeremy Bernard Corbyn as a director appointed on that date.
facts.notes: Maps to financial-interest-027 and company-link-jeremy-corbyn-campaign-limited. The Parliament name variant is preserved separately from the registered name.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as an unpaid bank signatory for Community Unity Limited from 27 February 2024, with no end date displayed. Companies House identifies COMMUNITY UNITY LTD as company 15392819, incorporated on 6 January 2024 and dissolved on 20 May 2025; its officer page does not list Jeremy Corbyn.
facts.notes: Maps to financial-interest-028 and company-link-community-unity-ltd. Bank-signatory status is not reclassified as directorship, employment, ownership or control. No end date is inferred from company dissolution.

facts.statement: UK Parliament records Jeremy Corbyn as an unpaid director of the Peace and Justice Project from 13 October 2020. Companies House identifies PEACE AND JUSTICE PROJECT LTD as company 12945855, active and incorporated on 13 October 2020, and records Jeremy Bernard Corbyn as a director appointed on that date.
facts.notes: Maps to financial-interest-029 and company-link-peace-and-justice-project-ltd. No ownership or control conclusion is encoded.

claims.statement: The existing voting lane is partial and must not yet be described as a complete career voting record.
claims.notes: This is a conservative coverage statement.

coverage_gaps.summary: Current identity, constituency, parliamentary affiliation and service-start data have been refreshed from official UK Parliament records.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Recheck the official member record when the portfolio is refreshed.
coverage_gaps.notes: Resolved for the bounded identity baseline on 20 July 2026.

coverage_gaps.summary: The baseline records official representation and parliamentary-affiliation periods but does not independently assess every historic election, constituency-boundary event or administrative transition across the full career.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Complete a separately authorised official election and boundary chronology if the declared identity-and-career scope is expanded.
coverage_gaps.notes: The section remains partial rather than implying exhaustive career coverage.

coverage_gaps.summary: The current official member career view has been captured, but this lane did not independently verify whether every historic parliamentary post or committee assignment is represented in that view.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Compare the member career record with official historic appointment and committee membership archives in a separately authorised lane.
coverage_gaps.notes: The section remains partial and no unlisted role or membership is inferred.

coverage_gaps.summary: Historic vote coverage is incomplete, including an unresolved 1983–2001 source gap and unrun or unverified 2001–2016 batches.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Verify the live server seed, complete controlled historic batches and document any irreducible gaps.

coverage_gaps.summary: The 13 July 2026 current published register snapshot is captured, but earlier register versions and interests outside the current twelve-month retention display have not been collected.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Open a separately authorised historical-register lane if complete longitudinal financial-interest coverage is required.
coverage_gaps.notes: The current snapshot is complete at capture time; the section remains partial because the official current page is not a complete historical record.

coverage_gaps.summary: Political-finance and donation records have not been collected.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Import authoritative Electoral Commission records and resolve the subject identity.

coverage_gaps.summary: The four company or organisation links explicitly displayed in the current 13 July 2026 Parliament register snapshot have been resolved, but earlier outside-work and company links outside that current display have not been researched.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Open a separately authorised historical outside-work and company appointments lane if complete longitudinal coverage is required.
coverage_gaps.notes: This lane does not expand beyond the four current Parliament declarations and does not infer ownership, control, remuneration, influence, motive, legality or propriety.

coverage_gaps.summary: Hansard contributions and parliamentary questions have not been indexed.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Build bounded Hansard and parliamentary-question indexers.

coverage_gaps.summary: Dated public positions have not been assembled into a reviewed timeline.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Define subjects, collect dated primary statements and link each position to evidence.

coverage_gaps.summary: No contradiction or change-over-time claims have been reviewed.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Compare dated records only after the position timeline is complete.

coverage_gaps.summary: No real organisations or public relationships have been entered into this fixture.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Add only defined, sourced public relationships and review chart eligibility.

coverage_gaps.summary: The live server database, logs, backups and source counts remain unverified because access is restricted to localhost.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Run the prepared read-only inventory locally on the server and review its output.

coverage_gaps.summary: Official UK Parliament sources now cover the identity-and-career baseline, but authoritative public sources for the remaining report sections are incomplete.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Add authoritative sources section by section through separately authorised research lanes.

coverage_gaps.summary: No full factual, legal/reputational, interpretation or publication review has been completed.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Complete all required review gates after evidence collection.

review_decisions.decision: Keep the fixture not ready and private; it proves structure and now includes a bounded official identity baseline only.
review_decisions.notes: A real publication decision must be made by Merrin after all evidence and review lanes are complete.
